canto_title: The Vision of the Empyrean and the Celestial Rose

scenes.scene_name: The Fading of the Earthly Light
scenes.summary: As day turns to dusk, the physical world dims, and Dante finds himself unable to look back at Beatrice.
Dante reflects on Beatrice's unsurpassed beauty and how the memory of her smile overwhelms his mind.
Dante admits that his poetic skill cannot fully follow the extent of Beatrice's beauty.
An angelic voice announces their exit from the sphere of light into the pure intellectual light of the Empyrean.
A sudden flash of light envelops Dante, leaving him momentarily blinded by its brilliance.
Dante is overcome by a new vision so intense that no pure light could protect his eyes.
Dante perceives a river of light flowing between two flowered banks, with sparks emerging and returning to it.
The light speaks to Dante, instructing him to drink from the river before his thirst becomes too great.
The light explains that the river and flowers are merely precursors to a much greater vision.
Driven by thirst, Dante leans down to drink from the river, experiencing a physical transformation of his vision.

scenes.scene_name: The Revelation of the Two Courts
scenes.summary: The flowers and sparks transform, revealing the manifest presence of both heavenly courts.
Dante prays for the strength to describe the splendor of the Creator's light.
The Divine Light is described as a vast, circular radiance that provides all life and power.
Dante sees the souls who have returned to God reflected in the surface of the light like mirrors.
Dante contemplates the immense scale and the natural law of the celestial Rose.
The eternal Rose emits a fragrance of praise directed toward the sun.
Beatrice directs Dante's attention to the white-robed saints and the movement of the heavenly city.
Beatrice identifies a high seat intended for Henry VII, who will one day straighten Italy.
Beatrice warns that blind greed can lead to destruction, like a hungry infant chasing away its nurse.
Beatrice foretells that the corrupt influence of Simony will be removed and cast down to the depths.
